nativeProps: HTML div attributes except owned children and change/value props

compositionPolicy.publicComponents: Composes canonical Button, TreeView, and UploadProgress items plus native forms and structural landmarks.
compositionPolicy.adapter: Consumers own storage, network, permissions, security scanning, retention, and persistence.
compositionPolicy.enhancements: Recovery, conflict guidance, storage context, operation announcements, and file virtualization remain independently selectable.
